ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership tier */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership tier (e.g., FRIEND, POWER, PRO) */,
  "monthly_price" REAL /* Monthly price for the membership */,
  "yearly_price" REAL /* Yearly price for the membership */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the membership tier */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Specifies the duration of the membership (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Any applicable discount rate for long-term commitments */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Number of days for a free trial, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership tier the user has subscribed to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country for regional content customization */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date for the membership */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, newsletter) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level required to view the content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the content */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content (e.g., nutrition, fitness) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for better searchability */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for analytics */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership tier purchased */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount charged for the membership */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, refunded) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for each transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_membership_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_id") REFERENCES memberships ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was sent */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "recipient_count" INTEGER /* Number of recipients for each newsletter */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletters_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the content was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being reviewed */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was addressed by the admin */,
  "admin_response" TEXT /* Admin's response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)
